highlights.text: I was looking for more upside this week, stating Monday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
My lean was bulls could keep it going through the holidays.
I wrote on Tuesday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
The first ingredient is an elevator down sell.
That footprint is my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll discuss a powerful Failed Breakdown long we had last Thursday/Friday around 6822 that provided a secondary entry for this weeks 150+ point long.

This sets up 6942, 6947, 6962, 6973 as the next target slate.” Overnight Monday into Tuesday we defended 6925 all night, quick trap below Tuesday morning, then we got to work on this arriving at 6962 high of day Tuesday.

post_title: After 5 Green Days In A Row, SPX Goes Red. Can Momentum Resume Next Week? December 29 Plan
